chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 3676 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Haring of case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.9977/2016 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 22-09-2025 On 15-09-2025 the following order was passed;- “None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. This petition is liable to be dismissed for non- prosecution; however in the interest of justice, matter is adjourned to 22-09-2025. Let direct notice be issued to the Petitioner and intimation notice to his Counsel for the next date of hearing.” Despite intimation notice to the Counsel for the petitioner for today, nobody has turned up to pursue this matter, which is pending since 2016 without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
